reviews.review_msg: AWESOME prof!! my favorite ling professor at SFU. very likeable guy, super approachable and if you have questions go see him in his office hours he is extremely helpful! Grading system is high but fair. Homework is based on completion then he has students present to make sure everyone understands how to go about it.
Good course for some easy credits.  4 assignments and 2 exams.  Assignments dont take too long.  Exams are simple and straightforward.
